intentional_divergence_from_paper_append.name: stable_regret_reference_best
intentional_divergence_from_paper_append.summary: Panels (a)-(e) use best stable payoff per player (ablation); paper Eq. (1) uses worst stable.

intentional_divergence_from_paper_append.name: c_etc_knee15k_scale
intentional_divergence_from_paper_append.summary: Short C-ETC exploration so cumulative-regret knee sits near ~15k (paper_fig1_knee15k). Appendix PDF panel (f) for C-ETC was tuned with a much larger effective exploration (this repo uses ~8.35 for that purpose in paper_default).

implication_for_panel_f: With θ=2.5 (knee15k), C-ETC commits early and often looks better on cumulative unstability than AE-AGS / P-ETC. For Appendix E style at θ≈8.35, use preset paper_appendix_e_fig1 (worst-stable regret, README funnel AE knobs); short runs can show high variance—prefer runs≥20.

tuning_under_knee15k.ae_ags: Run scan_fig1_knobs with --c-etc-log-coeff 2.5 and raise --T toward 100000 before trusting row order.
tuning_under_knee15k.p_etc: Co-tune --p-etc-explore-coef at fixed θ=2.5 (small grid); default 0.52 is not jointly optimized with knee15k vs AE-AGS.

artifacts_knee15k_theta25.scan_setting: N=K=5 T=25000 runs=5 seed=0 jobs=4 market=paper_rank c_etc_log_coeff=2.5; grid cf in {5,5.5,6} × outer {pick_one,round_sweep} × pull_tb {random,smallest_arm}

lowest_AE_unst_row_T25000.note: AE unstability remains well above C-ETC under knee15k; knobs only narrow the gap slightly.

full_horizon_bestref_try_runs4.setting: paper_fig1_knee15k_best_stable_ref + ae pick_one + pull random + cf=5, T=100000, runs=4

artifacts_knee15k_theta25.note_knee_ae_knobs: Default knee15k configs/presets use aeags_algo2_outer_loop=pick_one and aeags_player_pull_tiebreak=random after θ=2.5 medium-T scans.

knee15k_diagnostic.observation: cumulative_market_unstability means are identical for best vs worst stable_regret_reference; only regret panels change.

reward_noise_mode.note: run_experiment supports independent per-algorithm streams via --reward-noise-mode independent (deterministic salt per policy). Confirm against the paper's experiment description; default shared keys noise by (seed,t,player,arm) when matchings agree.
